## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on the shell scripts.
- [ ] Config renders correctly (single-site and, if relevant, multi-site).
- [ ] The Docker image builds and the binary runs.
- [ ] README / `.env.example` updated if configuration changed.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
